title: wolftpm: implement ECC P-256 key create/sign/verify
description:
Implement transient ECC P-256 key operations using wolfTPM2_* API.

## What
- EccKey struct wrapping WOLFTPM2_KEY (transient key on the TPM)
- Device::with_ecc_key(|key, dev| ...) closure pattern matching wolfhsm
  - Creates transient P-256 key (wolfTPM2_CreateKey with ECC P-256 template)
  - Runs user closure
  - Always flushes the transient key handle (wolfTPM2_UnloadKey) on exit
- EccKey::sign(dev, hash: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<u8>> — wolfTPM2_SignHashScheme
- EccKey::verify(dev, hash: &[u8], sig: &[u8]) -> Result<bool> — wolfTPM2_VerifyHashScheme
- EccKey::public_key_der(dev) -> Result<Vec<u8>> — export SubjectPublicKeyInfo DER

## Files
- wolftpm/src/key.rs (new)
- wolftpm/src/lib.rs (add pub mod key; pub use key::EccKey)

## Notes
Key template: TPM_ALG_ECC, TPM_ECC_NIST_P256, TPM_ALG_ECDSA, TPM_ALG_SHA256.
Flush transient key even when closure returns Err — same pattern as wolfhsm.
